opportunity.title: Show HN: An open-source safety net for home hemodialysis
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The challenge here isn't just the LLM routing – it's the *drift* in those models over time. You’ll need robust, automated regression testing against a gold standard dataset to ensure the safety net continues to function correctly, especially as the underlying LLMs are updated. Consider a layered approach to validation, with both synthetic and real-world (simulated) data.
actions.reasoning: My work in building agentic systems for complex task orchestration gives me a perspective on the reliability and safety challenges inherent in this type of automated, life-critical system.
